TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 10, Ayad Akhtar, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Ayad mqwas biru sa Brown pqwsan biru krahu. Ayad mqwas biru sa Columbia pqwsan biru krahu . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, aja* akħtar, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. pinqβaqan nja aja* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βrown pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. aja* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨolumβia pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 10, Ayad Akhtar, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Ayad mqwas biru sa Brown pqwsan biru krahu. Ayad mqwas biru sa Columbia pqwsan biru krahu . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, aja* akħtar, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. pinqβaqan nja aja* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βrown pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. aja* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨolumβia pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
